arts.ttl: Scott Brown gets Inter vs AC Milan name check as Celtic hero warned Kilmarnock legend 'still has your number'
arts.sum: Manuel Pascali was Manuel Pascali was on co-commentary duty for Premier Sport and attention turned to his time in Scotland

arts.ttl: Celtic star recognised by Champions League broadcaster alongside Kylian Mbappe and Mo Salah
arts.sum: One man who has stood tall for Celtic is Nicolas Kuhn, who hasn’t just been outstanding in Europe, but has probably been the best player overall this term. TNT Sports presented their top 20 Champions League goals of 2024 and Kuhn’s opening goal against RB Leipzig was listed 19th.

arts.ttl: Celtic's statement explains what really happened with unprecedented power outage vs St Mirren
arts.sum: Celtic Park was plunged into darkness as the Bhoys were beating St Mirren 2-0 after a power cut saw the floodlights and internal lighting go down, Celtic TV go offline and VAR deemed useless as the club tried desperately to get normal service resumed. As it happened, BBC man Alisdair Lamont confirmed the Celtic Park lights were out for a matter of mere seconds but, unfortunately, the live television broadcast and VAR remained offline as both teams agreed to continue the match without the video referee.
